initialBlackMs.label: Opening black
initialBlackMs.hint: black hold before the test pattern

splitBlackMs.label: Split black
splitBlackMs.hint: sliver of black after the test pattern

creationSpeed.label: Creation speed
creationSpeed.hint: stretch / compress the burst (1 = as authored)

crFlashSize.label: Flash size
crFlashSize.hint: diameter of the full-screen light flashes

crRayLength.label: Ray length
crRayLength.hint: how far the neon beams reach

crRingThickness.label: Ring thickness
crRingThickness.hint: stroke width of the shock rings

crRingExpand.label: Ring expand
crRingExpand.hint: how far the shock rings expand

linesBandPx.label: Test-pattern band
linesBandPx.hint: height of the white/black test-pattern bands

splashSpeed.label: Splash speed
splashSpeed.hint: stretch / compress the merger (1 = as authored)

spOrbSize.label: Orb size
spOrbSize.hint: diameter of the two inspiralling orbs

spCoreDiameter.label: Horizon diameter
spCoreDiameter.hint: final size of the forming event horizon

spShockExpand.label: Shock expand
spShockExpand.hint: how far the merger shock rings expand

spPlumeReach.label: Plume reach
spPlumeReach.hint: how far the gas plumes fling out

spDustSize.label: Dust size
spDustSize.hint: size multiplier for the dust particles

spDustSpiral.label: Dust spiral
spDustSpiral.hint: how tightly the dust winds inward

spArms.label: Spiral arms
spArms.hint: quantise the dust into N spiral arms (0 = free swirl)

spArmTwist.label: Arm twist
spArmTwist.hint: twist the arms with radius — tighter, curlier spirals

spWave.label: Petal wave
spWave.hint: radial flower/petal modulation (uses the arm count for symmetry)

spSwirlOsc.label: Swirl oscillation
spSwirlOsc.hint: breathe the field in and out as it spins

spColorCycle.label: Colour cycle
spColorCycle.hint: rotate the dust hue over time

spPulse.label: Radial pulse
spPulse.hint: pulse the whole field's radius rhythmically

spDriftOut.label: Drift out
spDriftOut.hint: how forcefully the dust flies outward at the end (50 = as authored)

spDustTrail.label: Dust trail
spDustTrail.hint: motion-smear instead of clearing each frame

spWarmth.label: Dust warmth
spWarmth.hint: warm gold vs cool sparkle mix

spDustFade.label: Dust fade
spDustFade.hint: how quickly particles fade as they drift

creationBeatMs.label: Creation beat
creationBeatMs.hint: how long the burst plays before the splash

splashHoldMs.label: Splash hold
splashHoldMs.hint: how long the splash holds before the reveal
